title: conyza sennii
intro: Conyza sennii, also known as the annual fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to alleviate various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Conyza sennii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
